_comment: SLICE-12 (bestiary-b4jm) CANONICAL-WINNER ENFORCE set. A CLOSED, curated list of DISTINCT model families that must WIN over a disagreeing raw_family when the model ID itself names the family (the ID-derived family equals one of these). This covers BOTH (a) the own-family-enforce ledger (a provider mislabels a distinct model as its parent: aion/magnum as 'llama', mixtral/pixtral/voxtral as 'mistral', wizardlm/inflection as 'gpt', intellect as 'glm', qwq as 'qwen', weaver/owl as 'alpha') AND (b) the vendor/org-namespace leak (raw_family is the ID's ORG, not a family: nousresearch->hermes, allenai->olmo, liquid->lfm). In reconcileIDDriven, when the ID-driven family differs from raw_family AND the ID-driven family is in this set, the ID-driven decomposition (family+variant+version+modifier) is adopted wholesale — the raw mislabel/org is discarded. The set is closed (no per-name runtime guessing): only an ID whose own leading token resolves to one of these distinct families triggers the override. Sorted alphabetically. Tied to the rc2 ledger + bestiary-xdbc Q3 (codellama own family). 'meta' is handled separately via family_aliases (meta->llama), not here.
